SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 CommentAdapter

java.lang.Object
androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter
public class CommentAdapter extends androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
RecyclerView adapter for displaying comments in the event detail screen.

This adapter is used in EventDetailFragment to display comments for a specific event. It supports:

  • Displaying user name, comment text, and timestamp
  • Timestamps formatted as "h:mm a" for today's comments, "MMM dd" for older comments
  • Context-sensitive action buttons based on user role:
    • Admins and organizers can delete any comment
    • Users can delete their own comments
    • Users can report other users' comments
    • Reported comments show "Reported" and become disabled

The adapter dynamically updates button states when user roles change via updateRoles(boolean, boolean).

另请参阅:
  • Comment
  • EventDetailFragment

  • 构造器详细资料

    • CommentAdapter

      public CommentAdapter(String currentUserId, boolean isOrganizer, boolean isAdmin, CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener deleteListener, CommentAdapter.OnCommentReportListener reportListener)
      Constructs a new CommentAdapter with the specified parameters.
      参数:
      currentUserId - the ID of the currently authenticated user
      isOrganizer - whether the user is an organizer for this event
      isAdmin - whether the user has admin privileges
      deleteListener - listener for comment deletion
      reportListener - listener for comment reporting

  • 方法详细资料

    • onCreateViewHolder

      @NonNull public com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull android.view.ViewGroup parent, int viewType)
      Creates and inflates the view holder for a comment item.
      指定者:
      onCreateViewHolder 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
      参数:
      parent - the parent view group
      viewType - the view type (unused, single type)
      返回:
      a new CommentViewHolder

    • onBindViewHolder

      public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder holder, int position)
      Binds comment data to the view holder at the given position.

      Sets user name, comment text, and formatted timestamp. Also configures the action button (Delete or Report) based on user permissions and comment status.

      指定者:
      onBindViewHolder 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
      参数:
      holder - the view holder to bind data to
      position - the position of the item in the list

    • getItemCount

      public int getItemCount()
      Returns the total number of comments in the list.
      指定者:
      getItemCount 在类中 androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView.Adapter<com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder>
      返回:
      the number of comments

    • setComments

      public void setComments(List<Comment> comments)
      Updates the adapter with a new list of comments and refreshes the view.
      参数:
      comments - the new list of comments to display

    • updateRoles

      public void updateRoles(boolean isOrganizer, boolean isAdmin)
      Updates the organizer and admin flags and refreshes the adapter.

      Called when the user's role information is loaded asynchronously, allowing the adapter to show the correct action buttons (Delete vs Report) after role data is available.

      参数:
      isOrganizer - whether the user is an organizer for this event
      isAdmin - whether the user has admin privileges

    • addComment

      public void addComment(Comment comment)
      Adds a single comment to the end of the list and animates the insertion.

      Used when a new comment is posted in real-time.

      参数:
      comment - the comment to add

    • removeComment

      public void removeComment(String commentId)
      Removes a comment from the list by its ID and animates the removal.
      参数:
      commentId - the ID of the comment to remove
